name: Neural Nomad #30: Monochrome — Void
description: Everything that wasn't essential has been burned away. What remains has the density of collapsed stars — too heavy to carry, too precious to release. This is what it looks like when you stop pretending.
threshold_note: Between who you were and what you're becoming, there is this colorless moment where you are simply, terrifyingly, yourself.
collector_meaning: You hold proof that someone stood in the void and didn't look away. Some transformations require witnesses.
